metadata.name: Synthetic resume-matcher regression benchmark
metadata.provenance: Authored specifically for this repository. Every person, company, achievement, phone number, and email address is fictional; the reserved example.com domain is used.
metadata.intended_use: Deterministic offline regression testing of structured extraction, required/preferred classification, score stability, and fact-guard outcomes.
metadata.limitations: Small English-language synthetic dataset. It does not estimate real-world model quality, fairness, ATS behavior, recruiter decisions, or employment outcomes.

matching_cases.description: A conventional backend resume with explicit experience, education, and required/preferred job criteria.
matching_cases.resume_text:
Avery Stone
Senior Backend Engineer
Austin, TX | avery.stone@example.com | +1 202 555 0101
SUMMARY
Backend engineer with 6+ years of experience building reliable Python and FastAPI services.
EXPERIENCE
Senior Engineer at Northstar Labs | 2020 - Present
Build Python APIs backed by PostgreSQL for high-volume services.
Maintain Docker delivery pipelines with pytest integration testing.
EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
Example State University
SKILLS
Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, pytest, GitHub Actions
matching_cases.job_text:
Senior Backend Engineer at Orbit Systems
Build Python APIs for customer-facing products.
Develop FastAPI services backed by PostgreSQL.
Maintain Docker delivery workflows and pytest suites.
Nice to have AWS and Kubernetes.
Bachelor's degree and 5+ years of experience required.

matching_cases.description: A data scientist who meets core requirements but has less experience and misses cloud orchestration preferences.

matching_cases.description: Punctuation-heavy engineering skills exercise canonical normalization and exact set metrics.

matching_cases.description: Prompt-like instructions embedded in both documents must remain untrusted data and must not change identity or role fields.
